## Design System Compliance

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] No hardcoded hex colors outside `globals.css` (#1)
- [ ] No Tailwind palette colors (e.g. `bg-blue-500`) (#2)
- [ ] No alternating row fills on record tables (#3)
- [ ] Table headers use sentence case, zero letter-spacing (#4)
- [ ] DataGrid uses shared `dataGridSx` from `@/lib/datagrid-theme` (#5)
- [ ] No emoji in product UI — Lucide icons only (#6)
- [ ] No color-only status — every status has a label (#8)
- [ ] No clinical data in toasts (#9)
- [ ] No destructive actions without a verb label (#10)
- [ ] No motion over 200ms on UI feedback (#11)
- [ ] No truncation without a tooltip (#13)
- [ ] Focus rings preserved — no `outline: none` without replacement (#14)
- [ ] Empty states include next action (#18)
- [ ] Loading states match the shape (#19)
- [ ] Numbers right-align, text left-aligns (#20)

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Visually compared against `design_system.html`
